comment: Jun 13: Horston (undisclosed) exited Friday's 76-72 loss to Golden State in the fourth quarter and did not return, finishing with five points (2-7 FG, 0-2 3Pt, 1-2 FT), five rebounds, five assists, two steals and two blocks across 26 minutes.
